data.title: Texas Is Becoming a Top Spring Break Destination -- But Restaurants and Hotels Can't Hire Fast Enough
data.description: OysterLink's latest data reveals a significant demand for workers in the hospitality sector, with over 9,400 open positions available in 57 cities across Texas. This marks a notable 7% rise from the previous months of January and February. The need for these roles comes ahead of the state's busiest tourist weeks, indicating a surge in tourism activity.

data.title: NYSE's interest in blockchain could revolutionize financial markets with tokenized securities, 24/7 trading, and onchain settlement.
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange's plans to utilize blockchain technology could potentially transform post-trade operations in the financial markets. By implementing tokenized securities, enabling 24/7 trading, and facilitating onchain settlement, NYSE aims to revolutionize the industry. This move could significantly enhance efficiency and transparency in financial transactions.

data.title: Crypto execs dispute viral claim that paper BTC has surpassed 21m cap, emphasizing derivatives don't create new Bitcoin.
data.description: Analysts are refuting viral claims that state paper Bitcoin has exceeded the 21-million cap, emphasizing that derivatives do not generate new Bitcoin. They explain that the total supply of Bitcoin remains capped at 21 million, contradicting misleading information circulating online.

data.title: Market outlook for 2/23: Major indexes SPX, DXY affected by 15% global tariff. Will BTC and altcoins hit new lows by 2026?
data.description: The value of Bitcoin and other alternative cryptocurrencies decreased as US stock markets reacted to US President Donald Trump's announcement of a 15% global tariff. This has raised concerns about the possibility of reaching new lows by 2026.

data.title: Survey data and case studies show actual usage of Bitcoin for payments, revealing number of users paying with BTC.
data.description: A recent study conducted by multiple sources has provided insights into the actual usage of Bitcoin as a payment method. The study found that a considerable number of people, estimated to be in the millions globally, are actively utilizing Bitcoin for transactions. This information was derived from survey data, analyses of various payment processors, and case studies from different countries. The research sheds light on the growing trend of Bitcoin being used for real-world payments, indicating a substantial adoption of the cryptocurrency in the global economy.

data.title: TRWD Moves Closer to Acquisition Phase as S-1 Update Clears Path for Nightlife Roll-Up and Uplist Strategies
data.description: An updated S-1 filing has brought TRWD one step closer towards acquiring lucrative nightlife venues as part of its expansion and move towards listing on NASDAQ.

data.title: Tether invests CHF 5M to grow Lugano Bitcoin hub till 2030, advancing AI and digital infrastructure.
data.description: Tether and Lugano have initiated Plan ₿ Phase II with a commitment of CHF 5 million. The project aims to achieve digital infrastructure sovereignty and integrate AI by 2030.

data.title: Trader predicts Bitcoin drop soon as price erases $74K breakout, losing momentum post one-month highs. Bearish sentiment rises.
data.description: After reaching one-month highs, the upward momentum of BTC price slowed down as an increasing number of traders started to make bearish predictions regarding the next move of Bitcoin.

data.title: Chronic Conditions Dominate this Year's List of Most Common (and Expensive) Pet Health Problems
data.description: For the 15th consecutive year, Nationwide has disclosed its findings on prevalent pet insurance claims. This year in Columbus, Ohio, on March 5, 2026, the analysis revealed that over 3.3 million claims were reviewed. The data provides insights into the reasons behind the countless visits that pets make to the vet throughout the year.

data.title: Viettel Solutions and Aduna Global Sign Network API Partnership at MWC 2026
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain, on March 5, 2026, Viettel Solutions (VTS), a part of Viettel Group, and Aduna Global disclosed a significant development during Mobile World Congress (MWC) 2026. They unveiled a framework agreement for Network API service, marking a significant collaboration. This agreement sets the stage for Viettel Solutions to enhance their services in partnership with Aduna Global.
